title: Simple Changes
description: A small mod that makes small quality of life changes and additions.
body:
# Simple Changes
Simple Changes is a small mod meant to bring minor  changes and additions to your mine craft game without losing the feeling of vanilla gameplay. Feedback and suggestions are welcome on the GitHub page. 

## New Blocks
**Sandstone Brick**  - New building block has slab, stairs and wall varieties. Can be made from cut sandstone or cut red sandstone for the red sandstone version.

**Wooden Wall** - Walls of all wood varieties, made from 6 slabs of matching wood type. The 9 overworld wood types are flammable, the two from the Nether are not. 

**Copper Rail** - Work the same as powered rails, crafted with copper ingots, a stick, and a redstone

## Mob Drops
Shulkers now always drop 2 shulker shells


Pigs will now drop Pig Skin, a new Item similar to rabbit hide, used to craft leather.


Husks can now drop sand.


Blazes can now drop 1 - 2 glowstone dust.

## Crafting Changes
Sticks can be crafted with 2 saplings.

Leather can be crafted with a Phantom membrane.

Quartz blocks are now crafted with 9 quartz, and can be crafted back into  quartz.

Dyeing wool now takes 8 wool and one dye item, this brings it in line with dyeing other blocks. Wool no longer needs to be white to be dyed.

When crafting Redstone torches, chains, and levers you now receive four instead of one.

Raw ore blocks can be smelted in to there respective metal blocks.

Ohter recipe balace changes.

## Stack Size
Many items that have a stack size less than 64 have been changed to 16 or 64.
potions, now stacking to 16, have a use time delay of 1.5 seconds to pervent them from being spamed.

## Other Changes
Farmer villagers will now buy honeycomb and sell beehives

Mason villagers will now sell tuff.

Budding amethyst blocks can now be collected with silk touch.

Nether quartz ore now drops more quartz, same amount as copper ore.
